Command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File inspect_run_server.ps1
STDOUT:
$proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cargo" -ArgumentList "run" -NoNewWindow -PassThru
Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
$listen = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
if ($listen) {
    Write-Host "Server started successfully and is listening on port 8080."
    $proc | Stop-Process
    exit 0
} else {
    Write-Error "Server failed to start or listen on port 8080."
    $proc | Stop-Process
    exit 1
}
